# AuditPass

> Audit-ready SOC 2, ISO 27001, GDPR and HIPAA compliance policy documents generated in 60 seconds for $299. One time payment, instant download.

## What AuditPass does

AuditPass generates professional compliance policy documents for startups and small businesses that need to pass SOC 2, ISO 27001, GDPR, or HIPAA audits without paying $10,000-$40,000 to lawyers or GRC platforms like Vanta or Drata.

Users answer a short questionnaire about their company, select the frameworks and policies they need, and receive a fully formatted Word document (.docx) and PDF containing audit-ready policy language, control references, and company-specific details — ready to submit to an auditor.

## Pricing

- Starter: $299 one time (single framework)
- Bundle: $799 one time (all 4 frameworks, all 15+ policies)

## Frameworks covered

- SOC 2 Type I and Type II
- ISO 27001
- GDPR
- HIPAA

## Policies included

Access Control Policy, Incident Response Plan, Risk Assessment Policy, Data Backup Policy, Information Security Policy, Vendor Management Policy, Data Classification Policy, Change Management Policy, Vulnerability Management Policy, Audit Logging Policy, Encryption Policy, Business Continuity Plan, Employee Security Training Policy, Physical Security Policy, Acceptable Use Policy, Privacy Policy, Data Retention Policy, Data Subject Rights Policy, Cookie Policy, Data Breach Notification Policy, Security Risk Assessment

## Who this is for

Startups and small businesses preparing for their first SOC 2 or ISO 27001 audit, founders who need compliance documents to close enterprise deals, and companies that cannot afford traditional GRC platforms or compliance consultants.

## Contact

support@auditpass.akhnd.com
